# claude_vault_credential (Resource)

A credential stored in a vault. Supports MCP OAuth, MCP static bearer, and environment-variable auth. Secret values are **write-only**: they are sent to the API but never stored in Terraform state, and never returned by the API. Structural keys (`type`, `mcp_server_url`, `secret_name`, `refresh.token_endpoint`, `refresh.client_id`) are immutable and force replacement. `terraform destroy` hard-deletes the credential.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `auth` (Attributes) Authentication details. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--auth))
- `vault_id` (String) ID of the vault this credential belongs to.

### Optional

- `display_name` (String) Human-readable name for the credential (1-255 characters).
- `metadata` (Map of String) Arbitrary key-value pairs.
- `secret_version` (String) Change this value to force the provider to re-send the write-only secret(s) from configuration (e.g. to rotate a token). Changes to write-only values alone are invisible to Terraform, so bump this to apply them.

### Read-Only

- `archived_at` (String) Archive timestamp (RFC 3339), or null.
- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC 3339).
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `type` (String)
- `updated_at` (String) Last-update timestamp (RFC 3339).

<a id="nestedatt--auth"></a>
### Nested Schema for `auth`

Required:

- `type` (String) `mcp_oauth`, `static_bearer`, or `environment_variable`.

Optional:

- `access_token` (String, Sensitive) OAuth access token (`mcp_oauth`). Write-only.
- `expires_at` (String) Access-token expiry (RFC 3339) for `mcp_oauth`.
- `injection_location` (Attributes) Which parts of an outbound request the secret is substituted into (`environment_variable`). Both default to true when omitted. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--auth--injection_location))
- `mcp_server_url` (String) MCP server URL this credential authenticates against (`mcp_oauth`, `static_bearer`). Immutable.
- `networking` (Attributes) Which outbound hosts the secret is substituted on (`environment_variable`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--auth--networking))
- `refresh` (Attributes) OAuth refresh configuration (`mcp_oauth`). Anthropic refreshes the access token on your behalf. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--auth--refresh))
- `secret_name` (String) Environment variable name (`environment_variable`). Immutable.
- `secret_value` (String, Sensitive) Secret value (`environment_variable`). Write-only.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) Static bearer token (`static_bearer`). Write-only.

<a id="nestedatt--auth--injection_location"></a>
### Nested Schema for `auth.injection_location`

Optional:

- `body` (Boolean) Substitute in the request body.
- `header` (Boolean) Substitute in request headers.


<a id="nestedatt--auth--networking"></a>
### Nested Schema for `auth.networking`

Required:

- `type` (String) `unrestricted` or `limited`.

Optional:

- `allowed_hosts` (List of String) Hosts the secret may be substituted on (`limited`; max 16). Bare hostnames, IPv4, or `*.`-wildcards.


<a id="nestedatt--auth--refresh"></a>
### Nested Schema for `auth.refresh`

Required:

- `client_id` (String) OAuth client ID. Immutable.
- `token_endpoint` (String) Token endpoint URL. Immutable.

Optional:

- `refresh_token` (String, Sensitive) OAuth refresh token. Write-only.
- `scope` (String) OAuth scope for the refresh request.
- `token_endpoint_auth` (Attributes) How the refresh call authenticates. Omit for a public client (`none`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--auth--refresh--token_endpoint_auth))

Read-Only:

- `resource` (String) OAuth resource indicator (response-only).

<a id="nestedatt--auth--refresh--token_endpoint_auth"></a>
### Nested Schema for `auth.refresh.token_endpoint_auth`

Required:

- `type` (String) `none`, `client_secret_basic`, or `client_secret_post`.

Optional:

- `client_secret` (String, Sensitive) OAuth client secret. Write-only.
